scripts.ios:app-test: pnpm ios:generate && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild test -project ios/VoxaCue.xcodeproj -scheme VoxaCue -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro,OS=latest' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.ios:build: pnpm ios:generate && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project ios/VoxaCue.xcodeproj -scheme VoxaCue -sdk iphoneos -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.firmware:test: uvx --with pip platformio test -e native -d firmware/voxa-wearable
scripts.firmware:build: uvx --with pip platformio run -e nano_esp32 -d firmware/voxa-wearable
scripts.verify: pnpm api:typecheck && pnpm api:test && pnpm api:build && pnpm ios:test && pnpm ios:app-test && pnpm ios:build && pnpm ios:release-verify && pnpm firmware:test && pnpm firmware:build
